MODULE: cosmos.core.parallel_workers
FILE: cosmos/core/parallel_workers.py (268 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Parallel Workers - Execute development tasks while chat continues
Spawns background workers that don't block the main chat loop

CLASSES:
- ParallelWorkerManager: Manages background workers that execute development tasks
while the main chat in
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_worker_manager(model_swarm=None, ollama_client=None) -> ParallelWorkerManager
- async def start_parallel_workers(model_swarm=None, ollama_client=None)
